word: As a project manager, I want to view projects for each department in the general projects overview
As a project manager, i want to create new projects so that planning and collaboration can be centered around a specific goal
As a project manager, i want to archive projects that have been completed, so that completed projects do not clutter up the project overview
As a team member, i want to view active projects in my personal view, so that i have an organized overview of my ongoing projects
As a project manager, i want to create milestones with a due date so that projects are divided into manageable, time-bound partitions
As a project manager, i want to edit milestone due dates so that any mistakes or changes to milestone due dates can be implemented
As a project manager, i want to be able to delete milestones
As a project manager, i want to change the status of a milestone so that the relative position of a milestone to the current progress can be accurately tracked
so that i can have a comprehensive overview of only the content that relates to a specific milestone
so that i am aware of new activity that needs my attention
so that clients will be informed of the team’s results
so clients will receive the correct files
so that it will be clear for clients on which areas feedback is needed
so that a delivery can be published later
so that clients will be aware of a delivery progress
so that i can quickly find files based on specific attributes
so that file access is restricted to the appropriate users
in a personal overview
so that i can edit a delivery
so that i can keep track of the available resources
so that individual task progress in the project can be tracked
